title: Lipetsk、Lipetsk Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]

content:
概述

Lipetsk是Lipetsk Oblast的一个城市，人口约510,000。A major steel production center in the Black Earth region, known for the Novolipetsk Steel plant and its modern urban development.
